title: Youth.Heritage.Europe. launches “Travel Light, Carry Heritage” summer engagement campaign
content:
This summer, from July to September 2026, Youth.Heritage.Europe. is opening a wide call to young people across Europe to engage with heritage: photograph it, film it, write about it — and share it. Whether it is a Roman amphitheatre discovered during a journey, a grandmother’s village in the Carpathians, a medieval fishing harbour in the Azores, or a Sámi sacred site in the North, every story counts and every place matters.

The Travel Light, Carry Heritage campaign unfolds through a series of regional thematic strands, each celebrating a distinct facet of Europe’s extraordinary diversity of heritage and landscape. With the spotlight on EU neighbouring countries in July, followed by Central and Eastern Europe in August, and Northern and Western Europe in September, the campaign becomes a journey across the full breadth of the European story, told through the voices of the people who are inheriting it.
snippet: This summer, from July to September 2026, Youth.Heritage.Europe. is opening a wide call to young people across Europe to engage with heritage: photograph it, film it, write about it — and share it.
creator: Liv Martin
